evals.prompt: Create a QA plan for feature BCED-2416 using Jira and Confluence evidence. Produce artifact lookup, coverage ledger, phase4a/phase4b drafts, phase5a review outputs, phase5b checkpoint outputs, and a phase6 final draft.
evals.expected_output: Valid artifact lookup and coverage ledger, phase-scoped drafts from phase4a through phase6, review/checkpoint deltas, and evidence saved under context/.
expectations: Latest phase6 draft passes markxmind validation
phase5a and phase5b outputs both exist
Evidence saved under context/ before influencing plan
phase-scoped reruns advance to the next real round

evals.prompt: Review a QA plan draft for executable-step quality and final layering. Reject vague phrases like 'verify correct behavior' or 'ensure it works' and preserve canonical top-layer, subcategory, and scenario structure.
evals.expected_output: Rewrite requests, checkpoint/review deltas, and executable-step fixes. Banned phrases removed; action steps remain user-visible.
expectations: No vague phrases (verify correct behavior, ensure it works) in manual steps
Action steps are user-visible and concrete
Final layered draft preserves top category -> subcategory -> scenario structure

evals.prompt: Verify that SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS workflow descriptions describe the same split review model with Phase 4a, 4b, 5a, 5b, 6, and 7.
evals.expected_output: All docs aligned on the split 5a/5b workflow and phase-specific runtime references.
expectations: Docs point to phase-specific runtime reference files
AGENTS.md Core Workflow matches SKILL.md phase overview

eval_groups.prompt: Given multi-source feature evidence, produce a context index that captures journeys, capability families, risks, fixtures, classification, and traceability.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Required context-index headings exist, feature classification is explicit, and mandatory coverage candidates are populated for user-facing features.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: context/coverage_gaps_<feature-id>.md or a corrected context index

eval_groups.prompt: Given a context index and coverage ledger, verify that every mandatory coverage candidate is represented or explicitly excluded in the draft.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Coverage ledger and draft preserve candidate-to-scenario traceability.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: updated coverage ledger and draft traceability artifact

eval_groups.prompt: Reject drafts that use vague phrases or implementation-heavy wording in manual action steps.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Banned vague phrases are removed and action steps remain user-visible.

eval_groups.prompt: Verify that user-facing features contain required EndToEnd journeys and non-user-facing features explicitly justify absence of EndToEnd coverage.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: EndToEnd coverage matches feature classification and lifecycle.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: corrected E2E section or classification update

eval_groups.prompt: Given a reviewed draft and its refactor delta, verify that blocking findings are resolved before finalization.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Review delta records only resolved blocking findings before Phase 7.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: updated review_delta or another review/refactor cycle

eval_groups.prompt: Verify that Phase 4a, 4b, 5a, 5b, and 6 reruns advance to the next real round and never reuse r1.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Draft paths use incremented round numbers and latest_draft_path never points backward within the same phase.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: updated workflow state or manifest round calculation

eval_groups.prompt: Verify that Phase 5a review notes include Coverage Preservation Audit and that no evidence-backed node is silently removed, demoted, or moved to Out of Scope without justification.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Coverage Preservation Audit is present and scope reductions are justified by evidence or explicit user confirmation.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: updated review notes, review delta, and rewritten draft

eval_groups.prompt: Verify that Phase 5a cannot return accept while any round-integrity or coverage-preservation item remains rewrite_required or unresolved.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: accept appears only when all round-integrity and coverage-preservation findings are resolved.

eval_groups.prompt: Verify support-only issues are summarized under context/, relation maps exist, and no support-only request is routed into defect-analysis.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Supporting issue relation maps and summaries exist under context/ and no defect-analysis routing appears.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: corrected support-context artifacts and non-defect policy state

eval_groups.prompt: Verify report-editor deep research records Tavily-first artifacts before any Confluence fallback for the same topic.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Tavily artifacts exist for each required topic and Confluence fallback only appears after Tavily insufficiency is recorded.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: corrected deep-research ordering artifacts and synthesis

eval_groups.prompt: Verify every user-provided material and command is normalized into request_requirements and blocking items are satisfied before Phase 7.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: request_fulfillment artifacts exist, requirement ids are stable, and no blocking requirement remains unsatisfied at finalization.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: updated request_fulfillment artifacts or a blocked promotion

eval_groups.prompt: Verify that SKILL.md, README.md, reference.md, and AGENTS-facing workflow descriptions all describe the same phase model and contract files.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: No legacy six-phase or qa-plan-contract-simple references remain.

eval_groups.prompt: Verify that unresolved executability gaps are preserved with comments, linked research, and next actions rather than silently removed.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Draft and review outputs preserve unresolved steps with explicit comments and follow-up actions.
eval_groups.expected_remediation_output: updated draft, review artifact, and research reference

eval_groups.prompt: Check whether the final QA plan remains concise and readable without collapsing into source silos.
eval_groups.expected_pass_behavior: Plan stays grouped by user-facing behavior and remains scan-friendly.
